title: OpenAI Proposes Giving 5% Stake to US Government
subtitle: The tech giant hopes to improve its relationship with the Trump administration and gain public support for artificial intelligence.

summary.en: OpenAI is currently in early talks to give a 5% share of the company to the US government. CEO Sam Altman believes this move could help share the economic benefits of AI with the public. The proposal aims to improve the industry's relationship with the Trump administration amid rising pressure. Other major AI companies have been approached, though it remains unclear if they will join the plan. This strategy comes as many Americans express concerns about the rapid growth of artificial intelligence.
summary.zh: OpenAI 目前正處於初步談判階段，計畫將公司百分之五的股份轉讓給美國政府。執行長奧特曼認為此舉有助於與大眾分享人工智慧帶來的經濟紅利。該提案旨在於壓力日益增加之際，改善該產業與川普政府的關係。儘管已接觸其他大型人工智慧公司，但目前尚不清楚它們是否會加入此計畫。此策略提出的背景，正值許多美國民眾對人工智慧的快速成長表達擔憂之際。

paragraphs.en: OpenAI, the company behind the popular chatbot ChatGPT, is reportedly in early discussions to give a 5% stake in the business to the United States government. According to the Financial Times, this proposal is part of an effort by artificial intelligence companies to build a better relationship with the administration of President Donald Trump. By giving the American public a financial interest in the company, OpenAI hopes to share the economic benefits of its technology more widely.
paragraphs.zh: 開發熱門聊天機器人 ChatGPT 的公司 OpenAI 據傳正處於初步討論階段，計畫將公司百分之五的股份轉讓給美國政府。根據《金融時報》（Financial Times）報導，這項提議是人工智慧企業為了與川普（Donald Trump）總統政府建立更良好關係所做的努力之一。透過讓美國大眾對公司擁有財務利益，OpenAI 希望能更廣泛地分享其技術帶來的經濟紅利。

paragraphs.en: Sam Altman, the chief executive of OpenAI, has been speaking with President Trump and other top government officials, including commerce secretary Howard Lutnick and treasury secretary Scott Bessent, about this idea. The proposal suggests that the government could hold these shares in a special investment fund, similar to the Alaska Permanent Fund. This fund, which currently manages wealth from oil, invests in stocks and pays dividends—regular payments of money—to the state and its residents. If adopted, this model could provide every citizen with a direct stake in the growth of the AI industry, even if they do not personally invest in financial markets.
paragraphs.zh: OpenAI 執行長奧特曼（Sam Altman）已與川普總統及其他政府高層官員，包括商務部長盧特尼克（Howard Lutnick）與財政部長貝森特（Scott Bessent）討論過此構想。該提案建議政府可將這些股份存放在一個特殊的投資基金中，類似於「阿拉斯加永久基金」（Alaska Permanent Fund）。該基金目前管理石油帶來的財富，透過投資股票並向州政府及其居民發放股利（即定期支付的款項）。若此模式獲得採納，即便民眾未親自投資金融市場，也能讓每位公民直接享有人工智慧產業成長的紅利。

paragraphs.en: This plan comes at a time when major AI companies are facing increasing pressure from Washington. Recent reports from The Guardian note that the government has been taking a stronger role in regulating the industry. For example, the company Anthropic recently had to stop access to its newest model after the government raised concerns about national security and the use of the technology by foreign nationals. While Anthropic has since resolved these issues, the event highlights the growing tension between tech firms and federal regulators.
paragraphs.zh: 這項計畫提出的時機，正值大型人工智慧公司面臨華府日益增加的壓力之際。根據《衛報》（The Guardian）近期的報導指出，政府在監管該產業方面正扮演更強勢的角色。例如，人工智慧公司 Anthropic 近期在政府對國家安全及外籍人士使用該技術提出疑慮後，被迫暫停其最新模型的存取權限。儘管 Anthropic 後來已解決這些問題，但此事件凸顯了科技公司與聯邦監管機構之間日益緊張的關係。

paragraphs.en: There is also a broader political context for these discussions. According to Ars Technica, many Americans are becoming more worried about the speed of AI development. Recent polls suggest that a large number of people do not want AI data centers built in their neighborhoods, and many feel more concerned than excited about the technology. With voters across the political spectrum calling for stricter rules, both the Trump administration and tech companies are aware that public opinion could affect future elections. Both sides have argued that if the government creates too many strict rules, it could hurt America's ability to compete with China in the global AI race.
paragraphs.zh: 這些討論背後還有更廣泛的政治背景。根據科技媒體 Ars Technica 報導，許多美國民眾對人工智慧發展的速度感到愈發擔憂。近期民調顯示，許多人不希望在住家附近興建人工智慧資料中心，且對這項技術感到擔憂的人多於感到興奮的人。隨著政治光譜各界的選民都在呼籲制定更嚴格的規範，川普政府與科技公司都意識到公眾輿論可能會影響未來的選舉。雙方皆主張，若政府制定過多嚴苛的規則，可能會削弱美國在全球人工智慧競賽中與中國競爭的能力。

paragraphs.en: While OpenAI is leading these talks, the proposal is still in the early stages. The Financial Times reports that the plan would ideally involve other major AI firms, such as Google and Meta, giving a similar 5% stake to the government. However, it is not yet clear if these companies are willing to agree to such a deal. Neither Google nor Meta has indicated that they support the idea of giving away a portion of their company. Furthermore, any final agreement would likely require an act of Congress to become law.
paragraphs.zh: 雖然 OpenAI 在這些對話中居於主導地位，但該提案仍處於初步階段。《金融時報》報導稱，理想情況下，該計畫將納入其他大型人工智慧公司，如 Google 與 Meta，並要求它們同樣將百分之五的股份轉讓給政府。然而，目前尚不清楚這些公司是否願意同意此類交易。Google 與 Meta 皆未表示支持轉讓公司股份的構想。此外，任何最終協議若要成為法律，很可能需要國會通過法案。

paragraphs.en: Interestingly, the idea of public ownership has also gained attention from other political figures. Senator Bernie Sanders has been pushing for a different approach. He has suggested creating a sovereign wealth fund—a state-owned investment fund—that would be paid for by a one-time 50% tax on the stock of the largest AI companies. While OpenAI’s proposal of a 5% stake is much smaller than what Senator Sanders has proposed, it shows that the concept of sharing AI wealth with the public is becoming a serious topic of debate in Washington.
paragraphs.zh: 有趣的是，大眾持股的構想也引起了其他政治人物的關注。參議員桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）一直推動不同的做法。他建議設立一個主權財富基金（即國有投資基金），並透過對大型人工智慧公司股票一次性徵收百分之五十的稅款來籌措資金。雖然 OpenAI 提出的百分之五股份遠小於桑德斯參議員的提議，但這顯示與大眾分享人工智慧財富的概念，正成為華府嚴肅辯論的議題。

paragraphs.en: As OpenAI and other developers prepare to list their companies on the stock market, some investors believe these firms could eventually be worth more than $1 trillion. This massive potential value explains why the government is so interested in how these companies operate. For now, the talks remain conceptual. Whether this 5% stake plan will actually happen, or if it is simply a way for tech companies to gain political favor, remains to be seen. What is clear is that the relationship between the government and the AI industry is changing, and both sides are looking for ways to balance innovation with public safety and economic fairness.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著 OpenAI 與其他開發商準備讓公司上市，部分投資人認為這些企業最終市值可能超過一兆美元。這巨大的潛在價值解釋了為何政府對這些公司的運作方式如此感興趣。目前，這些對話仍停留在概念階段。這項百分之五股份的計畫是否會真正落實，或者這僅是科技公司爭取政治好感的一種手段，仍有待觀察。可以確定的是，政府與人工智慧產業之間的關係正在改變，雙方都在尋求平衡創新、公共安全與經濟公平的方法。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A financial interest or share in a business or investment.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（賭注），這裡指公司股份。文中：OpenAI, the company behind the popular chatbot ChatGPT, is reportedly in early discussions to give a 5% stake in the business to the United States government.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To have a company's shares officially available for trading on a stock exchange.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（清單），這裡作動詞指股票上市。文中：As OpenAI and other developers prepare to list their companies on the stock market, some investors believe these firms could eventually be worth more than $1 trillion.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Approval, support, or a friendly attitude from someone in power.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（偏愛），這裡作名詞指獲得政治上的支持。文中：Whether this 5% stake plan will actually happen, or if it is simply a way for tech companies to gain political favor, remains to be seen.

sources.name: The Guardian Technology
sources.title: OpenAI ‘in early talks to give 5% stake to US government’

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: Trump gets OpenAI to offer US 5% stake, far lower than Sanders’ target

quiz.question: What is the specific purpose of the proposed investment fund mentioned in the second paragraph?

options.A: To provide direct funding to the Trump administration for regulatory enforcement.
options.B: To distribute dividends to the state and its citizens from AI industry growth.
options.C: To create a national security budget to prevent foreign nationals from accessing AI models.
options.D: To allow the government to personally invest in the stock market to increase its wealth.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據第二段，該基金的模式類似於阿拉斯加永久基金（Alaska Permanent Fund），旨在投資股票並支付股息（dividends）給州政府及其居民，讓公民能直接分享 AI 產業成長的經濟利益。選項 A 錯誤，文中並未提到是用於政府執法；選項 C 混淆了第三段提到的國家安全議題；選項 D 錯誤，因為該基金是為了讓大眾獲得利益，而非讓政府進行個人投資。

quiz.question: Based on the text, why might OpenAI be proposing this 5% stake to the government despite the potential financial loss?

options.A: They are legally required to do so by a new act of Congress.
options.B: They want to prevent Senator Bernie Sanders from implementing his 50% tax plan.
options.C: They hope to improve their political standing and reduce regulatory pressure.
options.D: They believe that the government is better at managing AI companies than private executives.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第一段與第三段，OpenAI 正面臨華盛頓日益增加的監管壓力，且政府對 AI 的干預（如 Anthropic 的案例）正不斷增加。透過提供股份，OpenAI 試圖與川普政府建立更好的關係，以緩解緊張局勢。選項 A 錯誤，文中提到這仍在討論階段；選項 B 雖然提到了 Sanders 的提案，但這並非 OpenAI 主動提出股份的主要動機；選項 D 文中並未提及政府比私人企業更擅長管理。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the word 'conceptual' mean as used in the context of the talks?

options.B: Based on abstract ideas rather than reality.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。文中提到「the talks remain conceptual」，意指這些討論目前僅停留在構想或理論階段，尚未落實為具體的合約或法律行動。選項 A 與文意相反，因為文中強調這還不是最終協議；選項 C 與 D 雖然在文中背景中有所暗示，但並非「conceptual」一詞的定義，該詞主要強調的是其「非實質、僅為構思」的狀態。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding the relationship between the government and the AI industry?

options.A: The government is planning to take full control of all AI companies to ensure national security.
options.B: AI companies are successfully using bribery to avoid all future government regulations.
options.C: Public opinion is the only factor that determines how the government regulates technology.
options.D: Both the government and AI firms are seeking a balance between innovation, regulation, and public benefit.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。文章最後一段總結了核心主旨，指出政府與 AI 產業之間的關係正在轉變，雙方都在尋找如何在創新、公共安全與經濟公平之間取得平衡。選項 A 過度誇大，政府並非要全面接管；選項 B 將股份提案誤解為賄賂，且文中並未保證能避開所有監管；選項 C 錯誤，因為文中提到國家安全與全球競爭力也是考量因素，不僅僅是民意。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
